query:
INSERT INTO rollRooms (title, avatarUrl, ownerId, threshold, maxParticipants, startAt, endAt, status, totalValue, totalPrizes, participantCount, botCount, actualPaidValue, actualPaidCount, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('【限时】赤火传说ROLL房', '', NULL, '0.00', 100, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), 'pending', '5000.00', 10, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('龙炎精英ROLL房', '', NULL, '100.00', 50, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), 'pending', '8000.00', 8, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),

('战意荣耀ROLL房', '', NULL, '0.00', 200, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), 'pending', '3000.00', 15, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('新手福利ROLL房', '', NULL, '0.00', 500, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 'pending', '1000.00', 20, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('VIP专属ROLL房', '', NULL, '1000.00', 20, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), 'pending', '30000.00', 3, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('每日签到ROLL房', '', NULL, '0.00', 100, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 'pending', '2000.00', 12, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('周末狂欢ROLL房', '', NULL, '200.00', 80, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), 'pending', '10000.00', 6, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('传说武器ROLL房', '', NULL, '300.00', 40, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY), 'pending', '12000.00', 7, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW()),
('稀有皮肤ROLL房', '', NULL, '50.00', 150, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), 'pending', '6000.00', 9, 0, 0, '0.00', 0, 'admin', NOW(), NOW());
